texto: The art of making True promises within ones ownself is termed as Will (Sankalp)... for beginners (like me) it is a tough learning and for siddhas
autor: they just become that way... effortlessly they sail...
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a they just become that way... effortlessly they sail...: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a sabedoria. O trecho “The art of making True promises within ones ownself is termed as Will (Sankalp)... for beginners …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sabedoria, dinesh-kumar, destiny-re-scripted pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de destiny-re-scripted.
